Container.Name: KeepLocal
Container.Overview: KeepLocal is a self-hosted, multi-user notes application with checklists, tags, colors, archives, collaboration, private uploads, five themes, a responsive PWA, and optional local Whisper transcription. The all-in-one image includes MongoDB, the API, AI service, and web client. Persist both configured data paths and provide a unique JWT secret before first start.
Container.Requires: A unique JWT_SECRET containing at least 32 random characters is required.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the KeepLocal web interface.

Config.Name: MongoDB Data
Config.Description: Persistent MongoDB data. Back up this path before updates.

Config.Name: Uploads
Config.Description: Persistent private note uploads. Back up this path together with MongoDB.

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: Required: generate at least 32 random characters, for example with openssl rand -hex 48. Never reuse the example from documentation.

Config.Name: Allowed Origins
Config.Description: Exact comma-separated browser origins. Use the public HTTPS URL when a reverse proxy is used; wildcards are rejected.

Config.Name: Client URL
Config.Description: Exact browser origin used for OAuth redirects. Match Allowed Origins.

Config.Name: CSRF Secret
Config.Description: Optional independent CSRF signing key with at least 32 random characters. JWT_SECRET is used when omitted.

Config.Name: JWT Lifetime
Config.Description: Session token lifetime, for example 7d or 12h.

Config.Name: Secure Cookies
Config.Description: Leave empty for automatic HTTPS detection. Set true only when KeepLocal is reached through HTTPS.

Config.Name: Trusted Proxy Hops
Config.Description: Use 1 for direct access and 2 when an external reverse proxy sits in front of the built-in Nginx.

Config.Name: Whisper Model
Config.Description: Bundled transcription model: tiny is the fastest and lowest-memory default.
